Labor productivity (output per hour), unit labor costs, and hourly compensation indexes, by industry(1987 = 100)
Year Mining productivity (output per hour) Mining unit labor costs Mining hourly compensation Oil and gas extraction productivity (output per hour) Oil and gas extraction unit labor costs Oil and gas extraction hourly compensation Mining, except oil and gas productivity (output per hour) Mining, except oil and gas unit labor costs Mining, except oil and gas hourly compensation Coal mining productivity (output per hour) Coal mining unit labor costs Coal mining hourly compensation Metal ore mining productivity (output per hour) Metal ore mining unit labor costs Metal ore mining hourly compensation Nonmetallic mineral mining and quarrying productivity (output per hour) Nonmetallic mineral mining and quarrying unit labor costs Nonmetallic mineral mining and quarrying hourly compensation Support activities for mining productivity (output per hour) Support activities for mining unit labor costs Support activities for mining hourly compensation Food productivity (output per hour) Food unit labor costs Food hourly compensation Beverages and tobacco products productivity (output per hour) Beverages and tobacco products unit labor costs Beverages and tobacco products hourly compensation Textile mills productivity (output per hour) Textile mills unit labor costs Textile mills hourly compensation Textile product mills productivity (output per hour) Textile product mills unit labor costs Textile product mills hourly compensation Apparel productivity (output per hour) Apparel unit labor costs Apparel hourly compensation Leather and allied products productivity (output per hour) Leather and allied products unit labor costs Leather and allied products hourly compensation Paper productivity (output per hour) Paper unit labor costs Paper hourly compensation Printing and related support activities productivity (output per hour) Printing and related support activities unit labor costs Printing and related support activities hourly compensation Petroleum and coal products productivity (output per hour) Petroleum and coal products unit labor costs Petroleum and coal products hourly compensation Chemicals productivity (output per hour) Chemicals unit labor costs Chemicals hourly compensation Plastics and rubber products productivity (output per hour) Plastics and rubber products unit labor costs Plastics and rubber products hourly compensation Wood products productivity (output per hour) Wood products unit labor costs Wood products hourly compensation Nonmetallic mineral products productivity (output per hour) Nonmetallic mineral products unit labor costs Nonmetallic mineral products hourly compensation Primary metals productivity (output per hour) Primary metals unit labor costs Primary metals hourly compensation Fabricated metal products productivity (output per hour) Fabricated metal products unit labor costs Fabricated metal products hourly compensation Machinery productivity (output per hour) Machinery unit labor costs Machinery hourly compensation Computer and electronic products productivity (output per hour) Computer and electronic products unit labor costs Computer and electronic products hourly compensation Electrical equipment and appliances productivity (output per hour) Electrical equipment and appliances unit labor costs Electrical equipment and appliances hourly compensation Transportation equipment productivity (output per hour) Transportation equipment unit labor costs Transportation equipment hourly compensation Furniture and related products productivity (output per hour) Furniture and
